/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/core/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/core/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/window/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/camera/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/scene/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Material.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Descriptors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Sync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/ClickIndicatorRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/GLBLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/DynamicMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/renderer/StaticSkinnedMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/map/MapLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/terrain/IsometricCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/nav/DebugRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/hud/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/animation/AnimationPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/animation/CPUSkinning.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/vfx/ParticleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/vfx/VFXRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/src/ability/AbilitySystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/vma/vma_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Glory.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o -o Glory  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libvulkan.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libspdlog.1.17.0.dylib libmeshoptimizer.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libfmt.12.1.0.dylib
